headline: BlackRock Launches Space ETF as Sector Pulls In $8 Billion
summary: New ETF adds IPOs within 10 to 30 days as investor interest in space funds accelerates.

raw.headline: BlackRock Launches Space ETF as Sector Pulls In $8 Billion

headline: Vinted boss sees 'fundamental' shift in consumer patterns, as secondhand firm notches $9 billion valuation
summary: Vinted is seeing a structural shift in consumer behaviour as habits form around the resale economy, its marketplace CEO told CNBC.

raw.headline: Vinted boss sees 'fundamental' shift in consumer patterns, as secondhand firm notches $9 billion valuation
raw.summary: Vinted is seeing a structural shift in consumer behaviour as habits form around the resale economy, its marketplace CEO told CNBC.
